faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Rutherford, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Rutherford typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing for all Rutherford residents.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Rutherford homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Rutherford take 2-4 hours for heat treatments or 1-2 hours for chemical applications. Follow-up visits are typically scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine while ensuring thorough treatment of all affected areas.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Rutherford home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to lethal levels for bed bugs. Chemical treatments may require you to leave for 4-6 hours. We provide detailed preparation instructions and work around your schedule to make the process as convenient as possible for Rutherford families.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for children and pets in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use family-friendly and pet-safe products, and provide clear instructions on when it's safe to return to your home. Heat treatments are chemical-free and safe for sensitive individuals, making them ideal for Rutherford households with young children or pets.
